# Rising harnesses — top 25 by 4-week star velocity

Velocity is the **flow** measure: stars added per week, averaged over the trailing 4-week window of refreshed metadata snapshots. It complements the tier overlay (a **stock** measure: cumulative stars + age + recency) and surfaces what is gaining traction right now, not what was popular historically.

Updated by the scheduled metadata refresh; requires ≥2 weekly snapshots per entry to compute. Entries with fewer snapshots are skipped.
